name: Medusa
description: Medusa is an open-source headless commerce engine providing storefront APIs for products, carts, orders, customers, collections, regions, and checkout. Build custom e-commerce experiences with flexible product catalogs and order management.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Browse and search the product catalog with filtering by collection, category, and tags.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details for a specific product with variants and images.

capabilities.name: carts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new shopping cart for a customer session.

capabilities.name: carts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve cart details with line items and totals.

capabilities.name: carts_update
capabilities.description: Update a cart with items, discount codes, or shipping info.

capabilities.name: carts_line_items_add
capabilities.description: Add line items to a cart.

capabilities.name: carts_line_items_update
capabilities.description: Update a line item quantity in a cart.

capabilities.name: carts_line_items_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a line item from a cart.

capabilities.name: carts_complete
capabilities.description: Complete cart checkout and create an order.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve product collections for organized browsing.

capabilities.name: collections_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific collection by ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: List orders for the authenticated customer.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an order by ID with status and line items.

capabilities.name: regions_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve available regions with currencies and tax rates.
